Defines the built-in ReferenceError object and its properties for the JerryScript engine.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines macros and properties for the `ReferenceError` built-in object in a JavaScript engine. It uses preprocessor directives to define and later undefine macros such as `OBJECT_ID`, `NUMBER_VALUE`, and `OBJECT_VALUE`. These macros are used to specify the object identifier and properties of the `ReferenceError` object, including its length and prototype. The `OBJECT_ID` macro assigns the identifier `ECMA_BUILTIN_ID_REFERENCE_ERROR` to the `ReferenceError` object, while the `NUMBER_VALUE` and `OBJECT_VALUE` macros define the `length` property and the prototype object, respectively, with fixed property attributes. This file is part of the implementation of the ECMAScript standard for handling reference errors.
